name: soa-express-better-auth
description: Service-Oriented Architecture boilerplate with Better Auth, Drizzle ORM, and PostgreSQL

scripts.build:shared: npm run build -w @soa/shared-types && npm run build -w @soa/shared-utils && npm run build -w @soa/shared-drizzle
scripts.build:all: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @soa/user-service && npm run build -w @soa/product-service && npm run build -w @soa/order-service && npm run build -w @soa/admin-service && npm run build -w @soa/gateway && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.dev: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && concurrently --names "gateway,user,product,order,frontend" "npm run dev -w @soa/gateway" "npm run dev -w @soa/user-service" "npm run dev -w @soa/product-service" "npm run dev -w @soa/order-service" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && concurrently --names "gateway,user,product,order" "npm run dev -w @soa/gateway" "npm run dev -w @soa/user-service" "npm run dev -w @soa/product-service" "npm run dev -w @soa/order-service"
